summary: The first executable no-yield run crashed inside the harness because the prewritten ExtGlobalV2 account reserved only the serialized None layout, then later hit a Some(pubkey) path during pending-admin transitions.
resolution: Reserve extra bytes in the prewritten global account and remove dynamic global parsing from the hot execution path.
promotion_gate: Do not treat this as a KAST product issue. It is a harness bug that was fixed before subsequent stateful runs.
